commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR modifies root AGENTS.md to say config/default additions can be `reviewMetrics` and merge-risk material when they affect users, upgrades, preferences, provider/plugin behavior, setup/startup, workflow, fallbacks, or operator action.

PR surface: Docs 0. Total 0 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a repository policy text change, not a runtime bug. The behavior can be checked by comparing current AGENTS.md line 26 with the PR diff and linked policy acceptance criteria.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can update the AGENTS.md wording to cover the missing `reviewMetrics` count/direction guidance without changing runtime behavior.

actions.reason: adopted job must be committed before worker dispatch

target.title: docs: clarify config default review risk policy
target.body:
## Summary
- Clarifies the root AGENTS.md ClawSweeper Review Policy for new or changed config/default additions.
- Routes those additions through reviewMetrics and existing merge-risk review fields when they can affect existing users, upgrades, provider/plugin behavior, persisted preferences, setup, startup, fallback behavior, workflow behavior, or operator action.

Closes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86288
Requested by @Takhoffman.

## Verification
- pnpm check:changed
- git diff --check

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: root AGENTS.md now tells ClawSweeper review workers to treat relevant config/default additions as review-metric and merge-risk material.
- Real environment tested: repository checkout on the repair branch.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm check:changed; git diff --check
- Evidence after fix: command output from the executor or CI for the repair branch.
- Observed result after fix: policy-only change passes changed checks and whitespace validation.
- What was not tested: runtime OpenClaw behavior, because this changes repository review policy text only.

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: issue-openclaw-openclaw-86288
- Source PRs: none
- Credit: Credit @Takhoffman for requesting the policy clarification in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86288.; No CHANGELOG.md entry is required because this is repository policy text, not an OpenClaw product/runtime behavior change.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed; git diff --check
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning high; reviewed against fa00c6183252.
